positive: A stylized, symmetrical mandala design centered on a bioluminescent deep-sea forest scene. Intricate coral structures, glowing jellyfish forming perfect spirals, and stylized geometric representations of exotic marine flora. The composition must be highly ornamental, using clean, sharp silhouettes and strong negative space contrast against a gradient background of deep sapphire blue and teal. Lighting is dramatic backlighting, emphasizing glow and detail. Vector art style, minimalist yet complex, suitable for screen printing on apparel, highly detailed, UHD.
